name: Test the Water Quality
description: Work with Dr. Maya to collect a river sample, run a pH test, identify macroinvertebrates, and report what the evidence suggests.

steps.description: Talk to Dr. Maya about how water quality is measured.
Collect a labeled water sample from the river.
Run the pH test by matching the test strip to the color chart.
Inspect the tray and identify which macroinvertebrates are present.
Report the water-quality results to Dr. Maya.

success_dialogue: Good evidence chain, Zuzu. You collected, measured, compared, and reported instead of just guessing.
reward_text: You earned 35 ZuzuBucks, 8 reputation, and the Water Scientist badge.
